content.raw:
AI tools

Tools are only useful when they become practice.

This hub collects Kris Krug's writing on generative AI tools, custom GPTs, open-source systems, second brains, creative workflows, and the messy handoff between capability and craft.

Tool practice

Personal systems

Second brains, assistants, retrieval, notes, and workflows that help you think instead of merely store more stuff.

Open the glossary

Creative workflows

Image, voice, writing, research, and publishing loops that keep taste and authorship in the process.

AI for creatives

Team enablement

Training and strategy for teams that need to choose tools, build habits, and avoid shiny-object chaos.

AI services

Read next

Build an AI second brain

How to make an AI memory system that supports your real thinking.

Fabric and open-source AI

Notes on augmenting human potential without locking everything inside a vendor box.

Generative AI tools archive

More tool notes, experiments, workflows, and practical AI field reports.

Need help choosing or teaching the tools?

Kris helps teams turn AI tool anxiety into practical workflows, training, and decision-making habits.

Ask about AI training
